# Issue Title

Add more example Codex prompts for each skill

## Description

Expand documentation with practical prompt examples showing how each skill can be used for SaaS dashboards, admin panels, AI tools, internal tools, and productivity apps.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add at least three prompt examples for each existing skill.
- [ ] Include prompts for full-page generation and targeted restyling.
- [ ] Keep examples realistic and concise.
- [ ] Link examples from the root README or each skill README.

## Suggested Labels

`documentation`, `examples`, `good first issue`
